positive: A mystical bioluminescent fox surrounded by stylized celestial flora and geometric constellations. The design features the fox in a clean, powerful silhouette, set against a deep indigo background. Use glowing cyan and electric teal accents for the bioluminescence, contrasted with deep blacks and rich purples. The composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, resembling a luxury textile pattern or screen print graphic. Highly detailed, vector illustration style, strong contrast, magical realism, kawaii aesthetic, minimalist jungle patterns, clean lines, no gradient wash.
